<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Attribute; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Controller\ArgumentResolver\RequestPayloadValueResolver; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\ControllerMetadata\ArgumentMetadata; use Symfony\Component\Validator\Constraint; #[\Attribute(\Attribute::TARGET_PARAMETER)] class MapUploadedFile extends ValueResolver { public ArgumentMetadata $metadata; public function __construct( /** @var Constraint|array<Constraint>|null */ public Constraint|array|null $constraints = null, public ?string $name = null, string $resolver = RequestPayloadValueResolver::class, public readonly int $validationFailedStatusCode = Response::HTTP_UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY, ) { parent::__construct($resolver); } }
